name: sunny
description: Project Sunny — AI therapeutic learning companion

scripts.test:tts: npx tsx src/tests/test-tts-sanitize.ts && npx tsx src/tests/test-tts-flush.ts
scripts.test:system: vitest run src/tests/test-tool-filtering.ts src/tests/test-canvas-ownership.ts src/tests/test-context-injection.ts src/tests/test-session-type-resolution.ts src/tests/test-assignment-manifest.ts
scripts.sunny: cd web && npm run build && cd .. && npx tsx src/scripts/launch-kiosk.ts
scripts.sunny:demo: cd web && npm run build && cd .. && TTS_ENABLED=false DEMO_MODE=true npx tsx src/scripts/launch-kiosk.ts
scripts.sunny:homework: cd web && npm run build && cd .. && TTS_ENABLED=false HOMEWORK_MODE=true npx tsx src/scripts/launch-kiosk.ts
scripts.sunny:homework:reina: cd web && npm run build && cd .. && TTS_ENABLED=false HOMEWORK_MODE=true SUNNY_CHILD=reina npx tsx src/scripts/launch-kiosk.ts
scripts.sunny:testmode:spelling: cd web && npm run build && cd .. && TTS_ENABLED=false SUNNY_STATELESS=true SUNNY_SUBJECT=spelling npx tsx src/scripts/launch-kiosk.ts
scripts.sunny:testmode:math: cd web && npm run build && cd .. && TTS_ENABLED=false SUNNY_STATELESS=true SUNNY_SUBJECT=math npx tsx src/scripts/launch-kiosk.ts
scripts.sunny:testmode:free: cd web && npm run build && cd .. && TTS_ENABLED=false SUNNY_STATELESS=true SUNNY_SUBJECT=free npx tsx src/scripts/launch-kiosk.ts
scripts.sunny:testmode:reversal: cd web && npm run build && cd .. && TTS_ENABLED=false SUNNY_STATELESS=true SUNNY_SUBJECT=reversal npx tsx src/scripts/launch-kiosk.ts
scripts.sunny:testmode:word-builder: cd web && npm run build && cd .. && TTS_ENABLED=false SUNNY_STATELESS=true npx tsx src/scripts/launch-kiosk.ts
scripts.sunny:testmode:reina: cd web && npm run build && cd .. && TTS_ENABLED=false SUNNY_STATELESS=true SUNNY_CHILD=reina SUNNY_SUBJECT=math npx tsx src/scripts/launch-kiosk.ts
scripts.sunny:testmode:ila: cd web && npm run build && cd .. && TTS_ENABLED=false SUNNY_STATELESS=true SUNNY_CHILD=ila SUNNY_SUBJECT=spelling npx tsx src/scripts/launch-kiosk.ts
scripts.dev:test: concurrently --names "server,web" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "SUNNY_TEST_MODE=true npx tsx src/server.ts" "cd web && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:canvas: concurrently --names "canvas,web" --prefix-colors "yellow,magenta" "PORT=3001 npx tsx src/scripts/test-canvas.ts" "cd web && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:live: concurrently --names "server,web" --prefix-colors "green,magenta" "npx tsx src/server.ts" "cd web && npm run dev"
